items.title: This Latin American rival to Amazon reports earnings this week. How to trade it with options
items.description: The Street expects MercadoLibre will do about $28.6 billion in revenue in 2025. Operating expenses have grown faster than revenue.

items.title: UBS upgrades real estate stock hit by AI fears: 'Rare buying opportunity'
items.description: The bank believes CBRE’s fundamental business remains strong and will be able to weather the transition to an AI-driven economy.

items.title: Buy this coffee and peanut butter maker as risks ease, says Bank of America
items.description: The bank said concerns about a previous acquisition and a relatively strong position to navigate GLP-1s means the stock is a buy.

items.title: Wells Fargo upgrades Google parent Alphabet, says it has '3 key traits of AI winner'
items.description: Analyst Ken Gawrelski upgraded the Google and YouTube parent to overweight.

items.title: The S&P 500 is caught in an unusually tight range. Is this bull market resilient or exhausted?
items.description: Mike Santoli looks at how the S&P 500 has spent nearly four months in an unusually tight range, repeatedly failing to sustain upside momentum.
